title: Add Community Fish
description: Introduce guppies to your established tank.

dialogue.text: Your Walstad tank is thriving. It's time to add some colorful guppies to create a lively community.
Float the sealed bag for twenty minutes to equalize the water temperature. Then slowly mix small amounts of tank water into the bag.
Release the guppies gently and dim the lights to reduce stress. Keep the temperature stable between 24 and 28 degrees Celsius.
Feed a small pinch of food and observe their behavior. Healthy guppies will explore every corner of the tank.
